Text:
Edited version of kzoacn's CBA.
Recommended to use with tuning pack: Onslaught_Tuning for extra units/buildings. 
Added functions from Advanced Game Settings by Zlatý Bludišťak.r
https://discord.gg/QFZVUwWNGU
Added support for new Ottoman & Malian factions

Recommended: Onslaught_Tuning pack | New Units | More Options 
Reinforcements arrive in groups every 5 minutes. 
Age up by eliminating enemies! Gain bonus points depending on unit type.
 +5 for Buildings & Special Units / +10 for Defensive Structures 
+25 for Production & Landmarks / +50 for Keep
https://discord.gg/QFZVUwWNGU
Patch added for Ottoman & Malian factions
Resources are generated every minute for each player
Each player gets 1000 of each resource every minute
Each player gets 2500 of each resource every minute
Each player gets 5000 of each resource every minute
Resources set at start of match
Deletes the animals on the map
Age up by eliminating enemy units
%1AMOUNT% Reinforcement units arrived at the Keep!
Each player gets 50000 of each resource every minute
Amount of time needed to win with Sacred victory.
Modifies game rates for gathering, production, research, building.
Multiplies unit movement maximum speed by selected value.
Changes maximum population capacity. Requires houses to reach it.
Modifies game rates for villager gathering rate
Changes initial population capacity without houses. Will not exceed maximum population capacity.
Should team lose a player, remaining members will share his population capacity and resources. Dynamic teams are not eligible for this.
Each player gets maximum resources every minute
Destroy all enemies. This option is required, unless you wish for player to be never eliminated even if he loses everything.
Amount of population added every 150 seconds
Timer continues from the moment it was interrupted on recapture
Each player begins with a King. The goal of this game mode is to kill all the enemy Kings. As soon as a player loses their King, that player is instantly defeated.
Player Scores are visible when Pinned Player Information is On
Player Scores are visible when Pinned Player Information is On
Continue playing until all your team's Keeps have been eliminated
Each player begins with a King. The goal of this game mode is to kill all the enemy Kings. As soon as a player loses their King, that player is instantly defeated.
Player Scores are visible when Pinned Player Information is On

Players that quit will be replaced by AI, instead of being eliminated.
REQUIRES TUNING PACK! Set the maximum population pool for Combat Ships & Siege Units (ex. Ram/Tower)
If not disabled, provides to each player slot level of bonus specified for that slot. Bonus type is either Economic, Military or Both.
Determines value of bonus provided by handicap to player on this slot in lobby.
